changes.text: Rebuilt sync engine — the app is instant from the very first frame.
Delta sync: only changed records are transferred, not the full dataset.
Background sync keeps data current without blocking the UI.
Update log: see what changed in each version under Settings.

blocks.title: What's New in MedTracker
blocks.subtitle: Instant. The moment you open it.

blocks.text: MedTracker now greets you with your data already on screen — your topics, your widgets, your stats — from the very first frame. No spinner. No empty boxes filling in one by one. Just everything, right where you left it.
Behind that instant launch is a completely rethought sync engine.
Opens before the network even answers.

Your most important numbers now live right on your device and load the instant the app appears — no waiting on a connection. The fresh sync still happens, quietly, in the background, with a subtle indicator so you always know it's working.

Your full history — every session, every exercise, all of it — is now kept on device. On a plane, in a basement, off the grid: open the app and it's all there, fully usable. When you're back online, it catches up on its own.

Instead of re-downloading everything each time, MedTracker now syncs only what changed — including edits and deletions made on your other devices. Less data. Less battery. Same perfectly in-sync experience.

rows: After the network responds (~0.5–2s on mobile)
Only what changed — up to ~95% less

blocks.text: That's up to 50–100× faster to seeing your data on a typical launch — and it only gets better the more history you build.
